last_planning_summary: Task 150 locked the next v0.5 roadmap after v0.4 adoption hardening. CAP-019 records real benchmark data, more product surfaces and examples, better conversation authoring reliability, stronger lock/relock/amendment and change-control UX, optional Homebrew only after tested evidence, optional factual landing page work, and optional downstream integrations only as separate packages. The CLI readiness gate reported READY, AMEND-013 was applied, ni relock wrote .ni/plan.lock.json, and ni run compiled .ni/generated/v0.5-roadmap.prompt.txt at 4000 characters.

recent_decisions.title: v0.5 roadmap is evidence-quality, product-surface, and change-control focused

recent_risks.title: v0.5 roadmap turns benchmark, product surface, or integration work into runtime claims

notes.planning_aid_only: Session state is a planning aid, not authority.
notes.locked_docs: Session state must not override locked docs.
notes.completion: Session state must not mark docs complete.
notes.raw_transcript: Raw transcript is not the source of truth.
